settings.heading: Compatibility framework
settings.copy: Built to support future structured datasets for product, device, platform, and workflow compatibility.

settings.heading: Compatibility and fit guidance
settings.copy: This section can later shift from block-based review content to metaobject-backed compatibility matrices or recommendation sets.
settings.source_note: Use this module for early internal review, then migrate repeated compatibility logic into structured datasets.

settings.heading: Follow-on support paths
settings.copy: Use these links to connect compatibility outcomes to downloads, manuals, or direct support.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Continue to firmware, drivers, or utilities tied to supported products.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Continue to setup guides or documentation tied to supported products.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.copy: Escalate when compatibility depends on a more specific deployment question.

settings.heading: Compatibility can route into a more structured recommendation flow later
settings.copy: This module preserves a clear escalation path now while leaving room for future calculators or guided selectors.
